# RentHuman

> RentHuman is an AI-powered nationwide event staffing platform operated by Air Fresh Marketing LLC, headquartered in Denver, CO.

## About

RentHuman connects brands and event organizers with vetted, professional event staff across all 50 states and 300+ cities. Services include brand ambassadors, promotional models, trade show staff, street teams, product demonstrators, hospitality staff, and mobile tour staff.

## Company

- **Company:** RentHuman (a division of Air Fresh Marketing LLC)
- **Parent company:** Air Fresh Marketing LLC
- **Location:** Denver, CO, USA
- **Email:** info@renthuman.ai
- **Website:** https://renthuman.ai
- **Coverage:** All 50 US states, 300+ cities

## Services

- Brand Ambassadors
- Promotional Models
- Trade Show Staff
- Event Staff
- Street Teams
- Product Demonstrators
- Hospitality Staff
- Mobile Tour Staff

## Key Facts

- 50,000+ vetted professionals in the talent network
- 98% client satisfaction rate
- 48–72 hour deployment capability
- Trusted by 500+ brands nationwide
- Real-time reporting and dedicated field management

## Contact

For event staffing inquiries, quotes, or partnerships:
- Website: https://renthuman.ai/contact
- Email: info@renthuman.ai
